name: OpenClaw Agent
short_desc: OpenClaw CLI coding agent, delivered as a browser terminal (PLACEHOLDER — set real image).
author: Starway
description: PLACEHOLDER ENTRY. OpenClaw is a CLI coding agent (not a native web app), so it is packaged as a container running the CLI behind a ttyd web terminal. To enable: build the image (CLI + ttyd) and push it to your Aliyun ACR, then set `image:` in docker-compose.yml, flip `available` to true, and bump `tipi_version`. See the repo README for the wrapper Dockerfile pattern.
